artifact_summary: Screenshot of a SCADA system showing the 'Level transmitter No.1' analog tag faceplate with configuration parameters.
artifact_blurb: Visual documentation of a SCADA system interface displaying the 'Level transmitter No.1' analog tag faceplate. The image details specific configuration parameters including the Process Variable (PV) status, filter time constant, and simulated PV setpoint, serving as a reference for SCADA standards appendix compliance.
